units.lean_file_body:
theorem vandermonde_nat (a b n : ℕ) : (a + b).choose n = ∑ k in Finset.range (n + 1), (a.choose k) * (b.choose (n - k)) := by
  rw [Nat.add_choose_eq]
  simp [Finset.sum_finset_product, Finset.sum_range_succ, Finset.Nat.antidiagonal_eq_range]
notes: Uses Nat.add_choose_eq from Mathlib; the proof rewrites the antidiagonal sum to the range sum.
